title.en: Ethereal Prism: The Dance of Light

description.ko: 수정 기하학을 통해 빛이 굴절되고 분산되는 매혹적인 탐구로, 생동감 넘치는 색채의 스펙트럼과 복잡한 광학적 패턴을 만들어냅니다.
description.en: A mesmerizing exploration of how light bends and splits through crystal geometries, creating a vibrant spectrum of colors and intricate optical patterns.

prompt: Cinematic macro shot of a triangular glass prism refracting a single beam of pure white light into a vivid rainbow spectrum across a dark surface. Soft bokeh background, intricate caustics, prismatic chromatic aberration, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution, sharp focus on the internal light paths and color dispersion.
